_comment: Dependency manifest for Claude Booster. Machine-readable companion to ARCHITECTURE.md. Keep in sync — same commit rule applies. This project is a Python 3.11 tooling system (no HTTP framework, no ORM). 'Append-only' here means the JSONL logs under ~/.claude/logs/, not a DB table.

installer_main.notes: Orchestrates entire install pipeline. Failure rolls back to backup via restore_backup(). Codex bridge runs last under exit-50 isolation (does NOT roll back Claude install). --no-codex-bridge skips the bridge.

installer_atomic_write.notes: tmp+fsync+os.replace guarantees no partial writes. On Darwin uses F_FULLFSYNC.

installer_write_settings.notes: Merges _booster namespace into user's settings.json. merge_settings() strips old booster@* hooks, unions perms, preserves user mcpServers/enabledPlugins. User hooks/permissions/MCP survive untouched.

installer_preflight.notes: Guards against Python<3.8, Windows/WSL1, Snap/Flatpak, network FS, missing FTS5 (exit 10/13/14/15/16).

install_codex_bridge.notes: Mirrors Booster commands into Codex CLI as skills/prompts + booster-command compatibility skill (cross-provider adapter). Exit-50 isolation: bridge failure does NOT roll back committed Claude install. Guards: symlink rejection (_validate_sources), frontmatter validation, _within_managed_roots path-traversal guard for stale removal, separate bridge manifest with SHA-256 records.

rolling_memory_init_db.notes: Schema v8. Migrations: v2 idempotency_key; v3 FTS scope; v4 preserve; v5 supersession (status/verified_at/superseded_by_id/resolve_by_date); v6→v7 model_metrics (drop+recreate); v8 claude_max_usage. FTS migrations run inside BEGIN IMMEDIATE so concurrent readers never see an empty FTS table. SCHEMA_VERSION must be bumped on any agent_memory change.

rolling_memory_memorize.notes: Core write path. Enforces content_hash dedup, idempotency_key upsert, status validation, rolling limits.

rolling_memory_memorize_with_merge.notes: Compounding: finds similar via FTS5+keyword overlap, merges if subset_score>0.7, else creates new.

rolling_memory_recall.notes: Core read path. touch_access=True updates access_count+last_accessed_at (side-effectful read). Status-demote ORDER BY for under_review/superseded rows.

rolling_memory_search.notes: FTS5 full-text search. Scope filter on joined agent_memory.scope (not FTS column) to avoid path-token leakage.

rolling_memory_consolidate.notes: Clusters similar memories (subset>=0.6, jaccard>=0.4, shared>=3 keywords), synthesizes via Haiku, atomically inserts new + deactivates originals. scope='all' forbidden; preserve=1 immune.

rolling_memory_build_context.notes: Formats markdown context within token_budget. Sections: directives, feedback, sessions, errors, decisions, project_context.

rolling_memory_build_start_context.notes: Formats consilium/audit rows for /start. Project-biased via _category_from_scope(). Uses get_readonly_connection() (URI mode=ro).

rolling_memory_anthropic_client.notes: Anthropic SDK client for consolidate() Haiku synthesis and token counting. Optional — absent key degrades to no-consolidate.

memory_session_start.notes: Entry point for session memory injection. Resets .delegate_counter, injects MODEL BALANCER routing summary + session limits. Never crashes Claude — errors logged, empty context returned.

memory_session_end.notes: Extracts error_lessons (classified by 11-slug taxonomy via _classify_error) and session_summary from batch file.

memory_post_tool.notes: <5ms hot path. Batches significant events. On report Write/Edit, forks index_reports.py fire-and-forget.

model_balancer_decide.notes: Idempotent per UTC day. Pareto scoring q=0.5/l=0.3/b=0.2 over (provider,model) per task_category using 14-day p50 latency from model_metrics. PINNED categories {lead, recon, medium, coding, hard, high_blast_radius} never overwritten by active scorer. Falls back to prior routing below MIN_SAMPLES (passive). scheduled_changes apply once (applied_on).

model_balancer_get_routing.notes: Returns {provider, model, [applies_to]} for a category. Cached on first call (_cached_decision). Providers: anthropic | codex-cli | pal | zai-cli | grok-cli.

zai_cli.notes: Read-only third-model external reviewer via Z.ai Anthropic-compatible GLM-5.2 endpoint. Does not store API keys or edit files; exits 64 if ZAI_API_KEY is absent.

grok_cli.notes: Read-only fourth-model external reviewer through xAI Grok CLI. Denies edit/write tools in review mode and records best-effort model_metrics rows.

grok_sandbox_worker.notes: Write-capable Grok code worker. Runs in a detached git worktree, captures git diff on stdout, and cleans the worktree on exit; Lead must apply and verify the diff.

model_metric_capture.notes: Captures per-tool latency + token usage into model_metrics (schema v7). One no_usage_sample logged per UTC day. Fail-soft (exit 0 always). Feeds model_balancer_decide.

claude_max_tracker.notes: INSERT OR REPLACE per session_id into claude_max_usage (schema v8). Read by model_balancer._get_weekly_max_pct() for 7-day rolling throttle decisions.

go_gate.notes: Enforces /go pipeline. Blocks (exit 2) when tool=Agent AND phase=IMPLEMENT AND no .go_active marker AND subagent_type not in {Explore,Plan} AND coding keyword present AND not subagent context. Otherwise exit 0. The .go_active marker is created/deleted by the /go skill (Phase 0 / Phase 4).

kpi_rework.notes: record: appends {outcome, worker_spawn_count, verifier_fail_count, first_pass_clean, defect_categories[]}. report: aggregates over a window. Wired into /go Phase 4 (record) and /start telemetry (report). Defect categories: contract_ambiguity, missed_failure_mode, integration_mismatch, weak_verification, capability.

model_tag_enforcer.notes: Enforces [model] tag visibility + balancer routing on Agent spawns. Advisory (exit 0) for missing tag / codex routing mismatch / anthropic tier downgrade; blocks (exit 2) only on Anthropic tier mismatch. CC bug #16598 prevents updatedInput — advisory via stderr.

verify_gate.notes: Blocks handover commits without verified JSON evidence block. Detects fake evidence (localhost, || true). Scans last ~200 assistant blocks.

dep_guard.notes: Blocks edits on critical files without dependency review evidence. Scans last 30 assistant blocks. Auto-skips for sub-agents (is_subagent_context).

financial_dml_guard.notes: Blocks UPDATE/DELETE/TRUNCATE on protected tables from dep_manifest.json. Enforces 'fix the producer, not the data'.

delegate_gate.notes: ADVISORY by design: over-budget -> exit 0 + nudge (NOT exit 2). Budget=1 action per window; recon Bash & Reads free. Phase-aware (RECON/PLAN exempt). Auto-skips for sub-agents. Reset to 0 at session start. Teeth live in go_gate/phase_gate.

ask_gate.notes: Blocks (exit 2) 'Apply patch? / Deploy? / Which option?' question-handoffs at turn end; forces Agent/Verifier spawn instead. Honours bypass marker (logged).

compact_advisor.notes: One-shot per session. Fires at 60% of real usage-block window (1M default), not transcript bytes. Marker consumed by compact_advisor_inject.

compact_advisor_inject.notes: Injects /compact reminder once per session when the compact marker is present, then clears it.

supervisor_supervise.notes: Main event loop behind /lead: policy->quota->detector->persistence. One worker per supervisor per session. Spawns headless claude CLI via stream-json.

supervisor_policy_evaluate.notes: Deterministic Tier 0/1/2 pattern matching, no LLM in loop. 13 deny-bash + 11 deny-path patterns always deny. Unknown tools -> escalate (safe default).

supervisor_quota.notes: Circuit breaker: closed->half_open(50%)->open(85%). Reserves 15% for supervisor control traffic.

supervisor_detector.notes: Adaptive silence: clamp(3xmedian_gap, 20, 180)s. FSM with 9 states. Accelerator phrases lower threshold.

supervisor_persistence.notes: Applies schema.sql idempotently. Validates decision/approved_by enums before insert.

supervisor_stream_json.notes: Spawns headless claude CLI in stream-json mode. Signal ladder for cancel: SIGINT->SIGTERM->SIGKILL.

called_by: Lead via Bash (consilium_bio, audit_external, recon, medium read-only)
codex_worker.notes: codex exec --skip-git-repo-check -m <MODEL> -. Read-only analysis / second opinions. Replaces PAL second_opinion/codereview as default external review. Exit 127 if binary missing.

called_by: Lead via Bash (coding tasks producing file changes)
codex_sandbox_worker.notes: Runs Codex in an isolated git worktree (git worktree add --detach), captures git diff --cached HEAD on stdout. Lead applies diff via Edit/Write so PreToolUse guards fire. Worktree cleaned in EXIT trap. NOT for high_blast_radius.

index_reports.notes: Walks reports/, parses YAML frontmatter, upserts via idempotency_key='report:<abspath>'. Bodies truncated to 8000 chars.

session_context.notes: Extracts readable conversation from JSONL. Strips hook noise. Supports --agent, --subagents, --grep, --tail, --no-thinking.

telemetry_agent_health.notes: Five anti-theater signals: evidence density, N/A ratio, overdue tags, stale citations, cadence. Sliding window default 30 days.

check_booster_update.notes: Compares installed git_sha with remote HEAD. Emits update notice if drift detected. Auto-runs install.py --yes when CLAUDE_BOOSTER_AUTO_UPDATE=1.

arch_freshness.notes: Warns once per session if source files edited but ARCHITECTURE.md not updated. PostToolUse exit codes ignored.

gate_common.notes: Shared helpers: logs_dir(), iso_now(), append_jsonl(), walk_up_to(), project_root_from() (handles getcwd() OSError), is_subagent_context() (auto-skip gates inside sub-agents).

gate_stats.notes: Aggregates gate decisions over a time window. Reports block/allow/skip rates.

_append_only_note: This project has NO DB-enforced append-only table. The real append-only contract lives in the JSONL logs under ~/.claude/logs/ (written only via _gate_common.append_jsonl, never UPDATE/DELETE): go_gate_decisions, delegate_gate_decisions, ask_gate_decisions, gate_bypass_attempts, financial_dml_guard_decisions, model_metric_capture_sample, compact_advisor, kpi_rework. supervisor_decisions is append-only by convention (no mutators in code) but not constraint-enforced.
_pinned_routing_note: model_balancer.json categories the active Pareto scorer never overwrites. high_blast_radius stays on Anthropic (Sonnet) via Agent tool so PreToolUse guards fire (Codex subprocess is opaque). Editing model_balancer.py DEFAULT pins is a silent no-op on existing installs — sync runtime model_balancer.json in the same change.

INV-01.description: No duplicate memories: content_hash unique per memory_type
INV-01.formula: UNIQUE(memory_type, content_hash) WHERE content_hash IS NOT NULL

INV-02.description: Idempotency key unique for upsert semantics
INV-02.formula: UNIQUE(idempotency_key) WHERE idempotency_key IS NOT NULL

INV-04.description: Status must be active, under_review, or superseded

INV-05.formula: status = 'under_review' -> resolve_by_date IS NOT NULL AND IS ISO date

INV-06.on_violation: ValueError: superseded_by_id is only valid when status='superseded'

INV-07.description: Supervisor decision must be approve, escalate, or deny

INV-08.description: Supervisor approved_by must be regex, haiku, or dmitry (or NULL)
INV-08.formula: approved_by IN ('regex', 'haiku', 'dmitry') OR approved_by IS NULL

INV-09.description: Circuit state must be closed, half_open, or open

INV-10.description: Consolidation is atomic: insert new before deactivating originals
INV-10.formula: BEGIN IMMEDIATE -> INSERT -> UPDATE active=0 -> COMMIT (or full ROLLBACK)
INV-10.on_violation: Rollback - originals stay active, no data loss

INV-12.formula: preserve=1 -> excluded from consolidate() cluster input
INV-12.on_violation: Row silently excluded (no error - by design)

INV-13.description: File writes are atomic via tmp+fsync+os.replace
INV-13.on_violation: tmp file cleaned up, target unchanged

INV-14.description: Install fully succeeds or rolls back to backup
INV-14.formula: try { write_all + write_settings + write_manifest } catch -> restore_backup()

INV-15.description: Gate hooks never crash Claude - fail-soft on programming error

INV-16.description: Delegate gate is ADVISORY: over-budget -> exit 0 + nudge, NOT exit 2
INV-16.on_violation: Nudge injected; hard enforcement intentionally absent (teeth in go_gate/phase_gate)

INV-17.description: Quota tracker reserves 15% for supervisor control traffic
INV-17.formula: circuit opens at usage_pct >= 0.85; half-opens at >= 0.50

INV-18.description: /go verdict is exit-code-only: Verifier test exit code is PASS/FAIL, never LLM judgment
INV-18.on_violation: FAIL -> classify W/V/A/E, re-spawn appropriate side, hard cap 3 retries

INV-19.description: Cross-provider independence in /go: Worker, Verifier, diff-reviewer not same provider/model
INV-19.formula: provider(Worker) may differ; Verifier != Worker; reviewer independent
INV-19.on_violation: Same-provider pairing is a contract defect (manual review)

INV-20.description: model_balancer pinned categories never overwritten by active scorer
INV-20.formula: category IN {lead, recon, medium, coding, hard, high_blast_radius} -> retain prior routing
INV-20.on_violation: Pin change in DEFAULT is a silent no-op unless runtime model_balancer.json edited too

INV-21.description: Codex bridge failure is isolated (exit 50) - never rolls back committed Claude install
INV-21.formula: install_codex_bridge() raise -> exit 50 (Claude artifacts already finalized)
INV-21.on_violation: Bridge error logged; Claude install intact

INV-22.description: JSONL logs are append-only - never UPDATE/DELETE
INV-22.formula: all log writes go through _gate_common.append_jsonl() (open mode 'a')
INV-22.on_violation: N/A - enforced by absence of UPDATE/DELETE on log files

migration_guard_rules.schema_version: rolling_memory.py SCHEMA_VERSION must be bumped on any agent_memory schema change. Current: v8 (agent_memory v5 supersession + model_metrics v7 + claude_max_usage v8).
migration_guard_rules.supervisor_schema: supervisor/schema.sql uses CREATE IF NOT EXISTS - safe to re-apply but does not migrate older shapes.
migration_guard_rules.fts_migration: FTS migrations run inside BEGIN IMMEDIATE so concurrent readers never see an empty FTS table.
migration_guard_rules.balancer_pins: Editing model_balancer.py DEFAULT pins is a silent no-op on existing installs; sync runtime ~/.claude/model_balancer.json in the same change.
